PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rowena Navia for and with Joseph McCue. Amy Harrington Former Court Appiointed Counsel for Patricia Thrash during her life.

The Court noted that there was no objection from anyone. Ms. Harrington stated that Ms. Thrash told her that she wanted to change her will to leave everything to Joseph, that she spoke with Paula Bibbs about it and that Ms. Bibbs did not feel that there was any forced issue. Ms. Navia stated that she did contact the two half Brothers and spoke of Ms. Thrash's realtionship with them. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
